search.query: `basesearch_20367("$nfo_hostname$","$gcp_project_id$","$gcp_exp$","$advanced_filter$","$src_vm_name$","$src_port$","$dest_vm_name$","$dest_port$","$protocol_name$","$span_token$")` | strcat src_vpc_name "," dest_vpc_name vpcs | eval vpcs = split(vpcs, ",")

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(sum_bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(sum_packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(sum_flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname gcp_exp sum_by_subnet src_vpc_name dest_vpc_name _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname gcp_exp sum_by_subnet src_vpc_name dest_vpc_name | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_subnet | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval p95=p95/1000000 | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname gcp_exp src_vpc_name dest_vpc_name "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename gcp_exp as "Project ID/VPC/Subnet" | rename src_vpc_name as "Src VPC" | rename dest_vpc_name as "Dest VPC" | rename pct as "% of Total"

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20367` nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" gcp_exp="$gcp_project_id$*" gcp_exp="$gcp_exp$" | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_subnet by nfo_hostname gcp_exp | search $advanced_filter$ | fillnull value="" transport src_host src_vm_name dest_host dest_vm_name src_vpc_name dest_vpc_name | search (src_vm_name="$src_vm_name$" OR src_ip="$src_vm_name$") (dest_vm_name="$dest_vm_name$" OR dest_ip="$dest_vm_name$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | search transport="$protocol_name$" | strcat src_vpc_name "," dest_vpc_name vpcs | eval vpcs = split(vpcs, ",") | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname gcp_exp sum_by_subnet src_vpc_name dest_vpc_name _time | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname gcp_exp sum_by_subnet src_vpc_name dest_vpc_name | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_subnet | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval p95=p95/1000000 | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname gcp_exp src_vpc_name dest_vpc_name "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename gcp_exp as "Project ID/VPC/Subnet" | rename src_vpc_name as "Src VPC" | rename dest_vpc_name as "Dest VPC" | rename pct as "% of Total"

table.title: GCP Traffic for Src VPC "$submitted:Src_VPC$" Dest VPC "$submitted:Dest_VPC$" from "$submitted:GCP EXP$" reported by NFO "$NFO$"

search.query: | search nfo_hostname="$NFO$" gcp_exp="$GCP EXP$" src_vpc_name="$Src_VPC$" dest_vpc_name="$Dest_VPC$" | `gcp_conversation_basesearch(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

table.title: GCP Traffic for Src VPC "$submitted:Src_VPC$" Dest VPC "$submitted:Dest_VPC$" from "$submitted:GCP EXP$" reported by NFO "$NFO$"

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20367` nfo_hostname="$NFO$" gcp_exp="$GCP EXP$" | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_subnet by nfo_hostname gcp_exp | search $advanced_filter$ | search (src_vm_name="$src_vm_name$" OR src_ip="$src_vm_name$") (dest_vm_name="$dest_vm_name$" OR dest_ip="$dest_vm_name$") src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$" | fillnull value="" transport src_host src_vm_name dest_host dest_vm_name src_vpc_name dest_vpc_name | search src_vpc_name="$Src_VPC$" dest_vpc_name="$Dest_VPC$" | `gcp_conversation(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10367: GCP Top Traffic Monitor” (syslogs with nfc_id=20367). This Module identifies GCP VMs with the most traffic. It consolidates VPC Flow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. This Module is packaged in NFO “GCP VPC Flow Logs” Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
